ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve" REAL /* Sleeve measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in centimeters (for pants/jeans) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the style belongs to */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the style is designed (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the style is suitable (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_styles_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size mapping */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style the size mapping belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard size */,
  "brand_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size specific to the brand and style */,
  "chest_measurement" REAL /* Chest measurement specific to the brand and style */,
  "waist_measurement" REAL /* Waist measurement specific to the brand and style */,
  "hip_measurement" REAL /* Hip measurement specific to the brand and style */,
  "inseam_measurement" REAL /* Inseam measurement specific to the brand and style (for pants/jeans) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_mappings_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_mappings_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, inventory manager, data analyst) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the user (e.g., slim, athletic, curvy) */,
  "preferred_sizes" TEXT /* JSON array of preferred sizes for different categories (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, compare, purchase) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
